title: Paragon Resource Pack
description: Paragon is a 32x Medieval-Fantasy themed texture pack for both Bedrock and Java editions of Minecraft. With frequent updates and a chest-full of additional content, there is always something new to experience!
body:
![Paragon RP Banner](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/65039b1799c7925f47e37a7e/a6271a56-57e3-4428-990c-65e4e2d4e39e/Features+Graphic+0.png?content-type=image%2Fpng 'Paragon Resource Pack Logo and Banner showing a bright mountainous landscape at sunrise')


### *Greetings, Adventurers!*

  Bestow upon your worlds the enchanting transformation of Paragon, where every block tells a story! Whether you are battling dragons, crafting potions, or building your next masterpiece, experience a tapestry of vibrant textures that breathe life into every brick and beast!

  So, don your armor, gather your scrolls, or merely dust off your map, and join us on this enchanting journey. There's much to explore, and the horizons are endless!

---
[![Available on the Minecraft Marketplace](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/65039b1799c7925f47e37a7e/d0cb9812-f17c-4735-8e3f-3ea839456224/Marketplace+Graphic_cropped+small.png?content-type=image%2Fpng 'Download Paragon Resource Pack: Available on the Minecraft Marketplace!') ](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp?id=6a1e9f98-601f-4943-b432-4d8b2f88176a)

### Also Available for Bedrock on the [Minecraft Marketplace](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp?id=6a1e9f98-601f-4943-b432-4d8b2f88176a)!

---


![32x Art Style](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/65039b1799c7925f47e37a7e/fa212750-adaf-4313-9f54-4a8561d5b34d/Features+Graphic+1.png?content-type=image%2Fpng '32x Art Style')
![3D Items](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/65039b1799c7925f47e37a7e/de1d76e2-5d45-4fe6-89b5-b5784407ec07/Features+Graphic+2.png?content-type=image%2Fpng '3D Items')
![Custom Mob Models](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/65039b1799c7925f47e37a7e/5b3f5f2b-648d-4c09-8aff-d7ee6475db3a/Features+Graphic+3.png?content-type=image%2Fpng 'Custom Mob Models')
![Blockstates & Models](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/65039b1799c7925f47e37a7e/40132257-6059-438f-9cba-1e5395b46200/Features+Graphic+4.png?content-type=image%2Fpng 'Blockstates & Models')
![Decorations](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/65039b1799c7925f47e37a7e/0ab7baad-e330-4579-91b4-13d8ec0f9837/Features+Graphic+5.png?content-type=image%2Fpng 'Decorations')
![Immersive UIs](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/65039b1799c7925f47e37a7e/a608d251-a994-419f-8c26-a9b2993508da/Features+Graphic+6.png?content-type=image%2Fpng 'Immersive UIs')

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

32x ART STYLE
- From the deepest caverns echoing with mystical sounds to the majestic landscapes painted with vibrant textures, every nook and cranny of your Minecraft world is about to be touched by the enchantment of Paragon. Let each pixel transport you to a cartoony medieval-fantasy realm.


3D ITEMS
- Breath life and depth into your inventory with intricately designed 3D items. The Paragon Resource Pack reshapes the mundane, giving every tool, weapon, and item a distinct, stylized form. Equip yourself with realism and watch as your Minecraft world unfurls in more dimensions.


CUSTOM MOB MODELS
- The creatures of Minecraft take on new, thrilling forms with custom mob models. Experience the wild, the wonderful and the whimsical as you traverse through a world filled with uniquely redesigned entities. (Optifine Required)


BLOCKSTATES & MODELS
- Paragon allows you to not only utilize blockstates for more customization but also introduces block models that elevates the visual complexity and diversity of your world. Unleash the true potential of every block, ensuring your world is as unique as your imagination!


DECORATIONS
- Enrich your surroundings with exquisite decoration models. From the grandeur of towering statues to the rustic charm of wooden crates, each model is crafted to enhance the beauty and authenticity of your medieval fantasy world. Let your domain dazzle with the detail it deserves!


IMMERSIVE GUIs
- Discover a new, immersive take on classic UI elements. Opening a container or chest feels like you are actually looking into it.

</details>

---

### - [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/ParagonResourcePack) Exclusive Content - 

![Paragon Decor & More Addon Key Art](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65039b1799c7925f47e37a7e/7c5f4b89-b949-46c2-bf87-c9881e0acfed/Decor%26More_KeyArt.png?format=250w 'Paragon Decor & More Addon Key Art')
![Paragon Adventures Datapack Key Art](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/65039b1799c7925f47e37a7e/b8633553-e9d3-4690-a1b8-883448b983bf/Adventures_KeyArt.png?format=250w 'Paragon Adventures Datapack Key Art')

- Paragon Decor & More - Hundreds of Decoration Models! (More added Every Month!)
- Paragon Adventures - A New Survival Experience Datapack!
- Paragon Pixels - Official Font of the Paragon RP!

[Download Patreon Content!](https://www.patreon.com/ParagonResourcePack)

<details>
<summary>How to Use Decorations</summary>

HOW TO USE DECORATIONS:

- Decor & More items use CustomModelData. I've compiled a [Spreadsheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1u7BIQ-W5oHgI7xw7bkUf0f-jZZIl0bkHLJIoLh75v-8/edit?usp=sharing) to copy + paste commands for easier access to items. 
- Now that you have the item, you can place it in an Invisible Item Frame, Invisible Armor Stand, or using a Display Entity for it to display properly in your world! 
- Some items are Dyable, they can be dyed in a Crafting Table like any other dyeable Minecraft item.

I'll be looking into other tools in the future to make accessing and using Decor & More items easier!</details>

---
